# AccessPath Guide

> Independent, source-led explanations of FCC Lifeline eligibility, verification, household rules, service, provider comparison, and device-promotion limits.

Canonical domain: https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev
Publisher: AccessPath Guide Editorial Team
Independence: Not affiliated with the FCC, USAC, Medicaid, SNAP, any state agency, or any Lifeline provider.
Important distinction: Lifeline primarily supports qualifying phone or internet service. A tablet is not guaranteed and any device offer is controlled by a provider's current terms.
ACP status: The Affordable Connectivity Program ended in 2024.

## Primary hubs
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/lifeline-program/
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/lifeline-eligibility/
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/documents-needed/
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/national-verifier-guide/
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/compare-lifeline-providers/
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/resources/
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/sources/

## Editorial policies
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/editorial-policy/
- https://accesspath-guide.pages.dev/fact-checking-policy/
